display.purpose: The running-timer readout only. Always tabular-nums.

title.purpose: Section headers, sheet titles, card headings.

body.purpose: Entry rows, copy, form values. 600 weight for emphasis.

label.purpose: Timestamps, durations, helper text, tab labels. Sentence case — never uppercase-tracked.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: The live-timer card; at most one element per screen.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets, menus, dialogs — layers that genuinely float.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Phone-first; content column caps and centers above this.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one clay action per screen — start, save, sign in.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #B4543B; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Nunito, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 14px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #9A4630; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B4543B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions — Manage, Add entry. Clay text, no fill, no border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #B4543B; font-family: Nunito, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 10px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F5E6DF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B4543B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Paper surface on the warm ground; hairline border, no shadow at rest.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E7E1D8; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; font-family: Nunito, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { color: #2E2A24; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-body { color: #6B635A; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Paper fill, hairline border; focus shifts the border to clay with a soft ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #FFFFFF; color: #2E2A24; font-family: Nunito, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid #E7E1D8; border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B635A; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #B4543B; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(180, 84, 59, 0.18); }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Pill with the category's tint fill and solid dot; unselected sits on paper with a hairline.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2E2A24; font-family: Nunito, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 6px 12px; border: 1px solid #E7E1D8; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-chip-selected { background: #DDEBE1; border-color: transparent; } .ds-chip-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4E9569; } .ds-chip-dot-idle { background: #6470B8; }

components.name: Live Timer Card
components.description: The signature component: the one committed clay surface, white tabular digits, pulsing dot, circular stop control.
components.html:
Tracking · Work
1:24:09
components.css: .ds-timer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #B4543B; color: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px 22px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(46, 42, 36, 0.06); font-family: Nunito, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-timer-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; opacity: 0.92; } .ds-timer-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FFFFFF; animation: ds-pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-timer-digits { font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-timer-stop { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FFFFFF; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-timer-stop-square { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 4px; background: #B4543B; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-timer-dot { animation: none; } }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Bottom navigation: active tab in clay, inactive in Field Stone, hairline on top.
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; background: #FFFFFF; border-top: 1px solid #E7E1D8; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; background: none; border: none; padding: 12px 0 14px; font-family: Nunito, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #6B635A; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-tab-active { color: #B4543B; }

narrative.overview: A tidy desk in morning light: warm-tinted surfaces, calm order, everything in its place. The interface is a quiet plane of warm off-white on which white cards sit like sheets of paper, separated by hairlines and soft, neutral light — never by loud color. One clay accent marks the single thing that matters right now (the running timer, the primary action); four muted category colors identify data and nothing else. This is a rework target: the system deliberately retires the original candy-pop skin — display fonts, coral glow shadows, bubble radii — while keeping its warmth in quieter forms.
keyCharacteristics: One hero per screen; everything else recedes
Warm-tinted neutral ground (#FAF7F2), white paper surfaces, hairline structure
A single clay accent used sparingly; category colors carry meaning, never decoration
One typeface (Nunito) at a fixed rem scale; no display font
Flat by default, gently layered; shadows are neutral light, never brand-colored

rules.name: The One Clay Rule
rules.body: Baked Clay appears on at most ~10% of any screen: the primary action and the live timer. Its rarity is the signal — if clay stops standing for "the thing happening now," it has been overused.

rules.name: The Color-Is-Data Rule
rules.body: Category colors appear only where they identify a category (dot, chip, stat bar, entry row tint). They never decorate empty space, headers, or chrome.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Fredoka is retired. New work never introduces a second family; hierarchy is weight and size within Nunito.

rules.name: The Sentence Case Rule
rules.body: No uppercase-tracked labels ("TRACKING · WORK" becomes "Tracking · Work"). Uppercase tracking left with the candy-pop skin.

rules.name: The Morning Light Rule
rules.body: Shadows are cast by light, not by brand: always neutral warm-gray, never colored. The old coral glow (rgba(255,107,87,0.35)) is forbidden.

dos: Do keep Baked Clay ≤10% of any screen — primary action and live timer only (The One Clay Rule).
Do use category tints only inside that category's own row, chip, or bar (The Color-Is-Data Rule).
Do separate surfaces with 1px Hairline (#E7E1D8) borders before reaching for shadows.
Do keep motion 150–250ms ease-out, state-driven, with a prefers-reduced-motion alternative for every animation.
Do set timer digits in tabular-nums at every size.
Do keep touch targets ≥44px — this is a phone-first PWA.
donts: Don't look like a "corporate SaaS dashboard": no navy/gray KPI cards, no hero-metric blocks, no dashboard chrome.
Don't tip into a "childish kids app": no mascots, no bounce or elastic easing, no crayon-primary palettes.
Don't drift toward the "dark techy tracker": no dark mode, no monospace UI text.
Don't build "cluttered data-dense UI": Stats shows one view at a time; no walls of numbers or chart overload.
Don't use Fredoka or any second typeface in new work.
Don't use colored shadows, 28px bubble radii, or uppercase-tracked labels — all retired with the candy-pop skin.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as accent), gradient text, or glassmorphism — banned outright.
